# Goblin Town — Vishal Gurung

> Playable portfolio of Vishal Gurung, an IT engineer based in Tokyo, Japan. The homepage (https://g0.monster/) is a pixel-art browser game; the text version of the portfolio lives at https://g0.monster/info/.

Vishal Gurung works on web development, WebRTC, system development (システム開発), and cameras. Creator of reality-map.

## Pages

- [Summary / About](https://g0.monster/info/): Text summary of who Vishal is, selected work, notes, and contact info — the best page to read for facts about him.
- [Playable town](https://g0.monster/): The interactive pixel-art portfolio game.

## Contact

- Email: grgvishal.gurung17@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/g0GobliN
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/goblin01_
